summary: Implementation review accepts the Harbor Runtime API adapter and fact-chain repair for #219/#220/#221/#222/#223.
reviewed_validation_summary: `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm smoke:runtime`, HTTP readiness/provider readback, `git diff --check`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item HARBOR-219 --json`, `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item HARBOR-219 --json`, and `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item HARBOR-219 --json` passed locally on 2026-07-08 UTC.
follow_ups: App supervisor and Core task execution must bind to this API in their own PRs before closeout.
Run provider detection again on a workstation with CloakBrowser installed before claiming Cloak launchability.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The implementation exposes a local HTTP adapter over existing HarborRuntime behavior and returns readiness, provider, identity, session, snapshot, and evidence-ref facts without raw credentials, raw profile storage, hosted browser, or external write actions.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: Node stdlib server routes are covered by focused tests; existing runtime smoke and local HTTP readback passed; fact-chain, verify, suite, carrier, evidence, and PR metadata readback passed on the current head.
